strengths: Extensive software and infrastructure engineering experience (20+ years).
Demonstrated technical leadership, mentorship, and knowledge sharing through workshops and a founder role.
Strong entrepreneurial drive and experience through founding GISCollective and numerous personal projects.
concerns: Limited explicit evidence of deep, strategic AI expertise or demonstrated AI products/platforms.
Lack of direct experience advising strategic customers/partners on cutting-edge cloud/AI technologies.
No advanced degree in an AI-related field (preferred qualification).
response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is an exceptionally experienced software and infrastructure engineer with a strong background in technical leadership and knowledge sharing, exemplified by his founder role and extensive workshops. While he has contributed to AI-agent infrastructure, his resume lacks substantial evidence of deep, strategic AI expertise or having built demonstrated AI products/platforms, which are central to this Principal Engineer role. Additionally, direct experience advising strategic customers on AI/cloud technologies is not clearly presented.
